name: Peyton 2pc Acacia Wood Loveseat and Coffee Table Set - Teak/Beige - Christopher Knight Home
description: This wooden loveseat and table are a great addition to any patio. The water resistant cushions in conjunction with the wood make both the loveseat and table ideal for an outdoor setting. This stylish and comfortable set is the perfect way to add some extra seating and relaxation space to your patio without dominating your space entirely.
